creator.affiliation: University of Minho, Department of Information Systems

Viticulture Commission of the Vinho Verde Region (CVRVV), Portugal

titles.title: Wine Quality
Vinho Verde Red and White Wine Physicochemical Properties and Sensory Quality

descriptions.description: This dataset contains physicochemical and sensory quality data for red and white variants of the Portuguese "Vinho Verde" wine. Two CSV files are provided: 1,599 red wine samples and 4,898 white wine samples, collected from May 2004 to February 2007 by the Viticulture Commission of the Vinho Verde Region (CVRVV). Each instance records 11 physicochemical input variables (fixed acidity, volatile acidity, citric acid, residual sugar, chlorides, free sulfur dioxide, total sulfur dioxide, density, pH, sulphates, and alcohol) and one output variable — a sensory quality score from 0 (very bad) to 10 (excellent) based on the median rating of at least three certified wine experts. For privacy and logistical reasons, no data about grape type, wine brand, or selling price is included. The dataset supports both regression and classification modelling tasks.
